subject: docs(burger-menu): add Theme UI in Burger Menu specification
body:
New section in BURGER_MENU.md specifying the dark/light toggle item
and theme picker UI for both persistence approaches:

- Toggle item: sun/moon icons, label flips to show target mode,
  aria-label updates with state
- Approach A (per-mode): scrollable theme list with max-h-52,
  dynamic section header, active checkmark, description tags,
  menu stays open during switching
- Approach B (combos): compact radio-style combo buttons,
  single "Theme" header, checkmark indicator
- Optional random theme toggle item
- Recommended full menu item order diagram
- Two new key lessons: keep menu open during theme switching,
  separate overscroll-contain on scrollable theme list
- Cross-reference from THEME_DARK_MODE.md to the new section

Tags: documentation, patterns, burger-menu, theme, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
